channel.title: Neovim on home
channel.description: Recent content in Neovim on home

item.title: Neovim + LaTeX + Linguistics
item.description: This is the first in a series of informational posts where I create technical write-ups on things I either find interesting or use on a daily basis. Preface Although this is a guide on how to use and install my Neovim configuration, this isn’t really an in-depth guide on how to use all the individual tools as that would take a really long time, and this already-large text would become even more overwhelming to others.
